narrative:
Precinct 0024 Loramie East (precinct in Shelby County) has 762 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.3 percentage points.
